mapper.select: select message_id as messageId, sender_id as senderId, (select name from user where id=message.sender_id) as username, (select head_portrait from user where id=message.sender_id) as headPortrait, post_id as postId, (select title from post where id=message.post_id) as postTitle, content as content, created_at as createdAt, message_type as messageType from message where receiver_id=#{receiverId} and ( #{messageType} = 1 and message_type in (1, 2) -- 如果传入的 messageType 是 1，则同时查询 message_type 为 1 或 2 的记录 OR (#{messageType} = 3 AND message_type IN (3, 4)) -- 当 messageType 为 3，查询 message_type 为 3 或 4 的记录 or message_type = #{messageType} -- 否则按照传入的 messageType 查询 ) order by created_at desc

select count(*) from message where receiver_id=#{receiverId} and ( #{messageType} = 1 and message_type in (1, 2) -- 如果传入的 messageType 是 1，则同时查询 message_type 为 1 或 2 的记录 OR (#{messageType} = 3 AND message_type IN (3, 4)) -- 当 messageType 为 3，查询 message_type 为 3 或 4 的记录 or message_type = #{messageType} -- 否则按照传入的 messageType 查询 ) AND status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET status = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} and ( #{messageType} = 1 and message_type in (1, 2) -- 如果传入的 messageType 是 1，则同时查询 message_type 为 1 或 2 的记录 OR (#{messageType} = 3 AND message_type IN (3, 4)) -- 当 messageType 为 3，查询 message_type 为 3 或 4 的记录 or message_type = #{messageType} -- 否则按照传入的 messageType 查询 ) AND status = 0
mapper.delete: delete from message WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} and ( #{messageType} = 1 and message_type in (1, 2) -- 如果传入的 messageType 是 1，则同时查询 message_type 为 1 或 2 的记录 OR (#{messageType} = 3 AND message_type IN (3, 4)) -- 当 messageType 为 3，查询 message_type 为 3 或 4 的记录 or message_type = #{messageType} -- 否则按照传入的 messageType 查询 )
mapper.select: select message_id as messageId, sender_id as senderId, (select name from user where id=message.sender_id) as username, (select head_portrait from user where id=message.sender_id) as headPortrait, post_id as postId, (select title from post where id=message.post_id) as postTitle, content as content, created_at as createdAt, message_type as messageType from message where receiver_id = #{receiverId} and ( #{messageType} = 1 and message_type in (1, 2) -- 如果传入的 messageType 是 1，则同时查询 message_type 为 1 或 2 的记录 OR (#{messageType} = 3 AND message_type IN (3, 4)) -- 当 messageType 为 3，查询 message_type 为 3 或 4 的记录 or message_type = #{messageType} -- 否则按照传入的 messageType 查询 ) and created_at > #{timeStamp} order by created_at desc limit #{limit}

select message_id as messageId, sender_id as senderId, post_id as postId, (select title from post where id=message.post_id) as postTitle, content as content, created_at as createdAt, message_type as messageType from message where receiver_id = #{receiverId} and ( #{messageType} = 1 and message_type in (1, 2) -- 如果传入的 messageType 是 1，则同时查询 message_type 为 1 或 2 的记录 OR (#{messageType} = 3 AND message_type IN (3, 4)) -- 当 messageType 为 3，查询 message_type 为 3 或 4 的记录 or message_type = #{messageType} -- 否则按照传入的 messageType 查询 ) order by created_at desc

select count(*) from message where receiver_id=#{receiverId} and ( #{messageType} = 1 and message_type in (1, 2) -- 如果传入的 messageType 是 1，则同时查询 message_type 为 1 或 2 的记录 OR (#{messageType} = 3 AND message_type IN (3, 4)) -- 当 messageType 为 3，查询 message_type 为 3 或 4 的记录 or message_type = #{messageType} -- 否则按照传入的 messageType 查询 )
